encapsulation-and-validation.label: Encapsulation and Validation
encapsulation-and-validation.summary: Protect object state with methods that validate changes before saving them.

try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch0.title: Encapsulation in Practice
try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch0.prompt: Create a class `Car` with a private attribute `__fuel_level` and methods to add fuel and drive. Ensure that the fuel level cannot exceed 100 or drop below 0.
try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch0.hint: Read the task "Encapsulation in Practice" and identify the required result.

try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch1.title: Validation in Practice
try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch1.prompt: Implement a `Temperature` class with a private attribute `__celsius`. Add methods to set and get the temperature, ensuring it remains within a realistic range (-273.15 to 1000).
try_encapsulation_and_validation_sketch1.hint: Read the task "Validation in Practice" and identify the required result.

fb-encapsulation-and-validation-0.title: Encapsulation Concept
fb-encapsulation-and-validation-0.prompt: In encapsulation, the data and methods are bundled into a single unit called a [blank1].
fb-encapsulation-and-validation-0.hint: Think about the structure that holds both data and methods in OOP.

help.concept: Encapsulation involves bundling data and methods into a the missing term.
help.hint_1: The unit that encapsulates data and methods is a the missing term.
help.hint_2: In OOP, a the missing term is the blueprint for creating objects, encapsulating data and methods.

fb-encapsulation-and-validation-0.template: In encapsulation, the data and methods are bundled into a single unit called a [blank1].

fb-encapsulation-and-validation-1.title: Validation Purpose
fb-encapsulation-and-validation-1.prompt: Validation ensures that data adheres to [blank1] before being set.
fb-encapsulation-and-validation-1.hint: Consider what validation checks against when setting data.

help.concept: Validation checks data against the missing term or rules before setting it.
help.hint_1: Validation ensures data meets specific rules or the missing term.
help.hint_2: the missing term are the rules that data must adhere to during validation.

fb-encapsulation-and-validation-1.template: Validation ensures that data adheres to [blank1] before being set.

mc-encapsulation-and-validation-0.title: Encapsulation Benefits
mc-encapsulation-and-validation-0.prompt: Which of the following are benefits of encapsulation? Select all that apply.
mc-encapsulation-and-validation-0.hint: Consider how encapsulation affects data security and code maintenance.

help.concept: Encapsulation protects data and improves code maintainability.
help.hint_1: Encapsulation hides the internal state and requires all interaction to occur through methods.
help.hint_2: Encapsulation helps in maintaining code by reducing dependencies.

mc-encapsulation-and-validation-1.title: Validation in Methods
mc-encapsulation-and-validation-1.prompt: Why is validation important in methods that modify object state? Select all that apply.
mc-encapsulation-and-validation-1.hint: Think about the role of validation in maintaining object integrity.

help.concept: Validation ensures that changes to object state are valid and consistent.
help.hint_1: Validation prevents invalid data from being set, maintaining object integrity.
help.hint_2: Without validation, objects can enter invalid states, leading to errors.

options.b: Allows any data to be set

dr-encapsulation-and-validation-0.title: Steps to Implement Encapsulation
dr-encapsulation-and-validation-0.prompt: Arrange the steps to implement encapsulation in a class.
dr-encapsulation-and-validation-0.hint: Start with defining the class and end with using methods to access data.

help.concept: Encapsulation involves defining a class, using private attributes, and providing methods for access.
help.hint_1: Begin by defining the class and its attributes.
help.hint_2: Use methods to control access to the attributes.

policy_single_choice_1.title: Identify the result of running code
policy_single_choice_1.prompt: In "Encapsulation and Validation", what should you check after running a Python program?
policy_single_choice_1.hint: Running code lets you inspect what the program displays.

help.concept: When you run Python code, the most important feedback is usually the output or error message.
help.hint_2: Printed values appear after the program runs.

options.a: The output shown by the program
